trivia_bullets.text: One of 20 Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cards in the Fear of cycle spanning DSK+DSC, each literalizing a distinct human fear. Top-down design: the creative team built around Modern Horror / haunted house tropes.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Top of the Duskmourning, Part 1'
Wizards of the Coast: 'Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics'

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text names Jakob, an unnamed House victim caught in an endless fall — months in, he has run out of breath to scream. Not a named major Duskmourn story character; a flavor-vignette victim.

Costs {3}{U}{U}, 4/4 Flying. Attack trigger strips -2/-0 and removes flying from a defending creature. Hard to block without two fliers; double-blue cost narrows it to dedicated blue decks. EDHREC rank 18,564 — low Commander adoption. Limited analysts rated it highly for evasive top-end power.
sources: Draftsim DSK Limited Set Review (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Maxime Minard. Hipsters of the Coast noted Minard as a newer Magic illustrator with Phyrexia: All Will Be One as an early multi-card showcase set.
sources: Hipstersofthecoast.com: 'Phyrexia: All Will Be One Grand Art Tour' (via WebSearch snippet)

related_cards.note: Fellow blue Nightmare in the cycle

related_cards.name: Fear of Missing Out
related_cards.note: Red Nightmare; MaRo's design-article example card

frontmatter_updates.mana_cost_added: {3}{U}{U} (was missing from frontmatter; confirmed via Scryfall API)
